message:
perf(transport): optimize load balancer single-select and avoid intermediate allocation

LoadBalancer::select_top_n: add early return for n==0/empty and
specialized O(n) single-element selection that avoids sorting.

LoadBalancer::select_single: rewrite per-strategy to iterate endpoints
directly without materializing a filtered SmallVec<[&Arc<Endpoint>; 8]>:
- LeastConnections: single-pass minimum scan
- WeightedLeastConnections: cross-multiply comparison avoiding division
- RoundRobin: count-then-nth with lazy filter
- WeightedRoundRobin: cumulative weight scan with inline filtering
- Random: unchanged (already optimized)

This eliminates a heap allocation per request for the common
single-endpoint selection path.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
